$schema-note: Project-scoped MCP servers for Claude Code on this repo. DEV-TOOLING ONLY — none of these is a runtime dependency and the app runs identically with all of them disconnected. No secrets live here: Vercel uses interactive OAuth, Context7 and Playwright need none. See docs/DEV-TOOLING.md for the governance notes on each.

playwright.description: Microsoft Playwright MCP — drives a local Chromium so an agent can author/repair E2E and do visual verification. Fully local/self-hosted; no data leaves the machine. Point it at PREVIEW builds with seeded accounts, never production PII.

context7.description: Context7 — fetches up-to-date library docs (Next.js 16 / React 19 / Tailwind v4). Transmits only the doc query you send; never send case data. No project data stored.

vercel.description: Vercel MCP — build logs, runtime logs and deployment status for the existing project. Authorize interactively via OAuth (`/mcp` in an interactive Claude Code session); no token is stored in the repo. Reads logs Vercel already holds; adds no new external processor.
